compTarget: {count, plural, =0 {Target competition} one {Target competition} other {Target competitions}}
monitorEmpty: This athlete has no monitoring data yet. Once they log their load, it’ll show up here.
noMacroSub: Assign a macrocycle to load their 1RMs and build the plan.
previewEmpty: No session this week — the athlete would see their empty state. Assign or adjust the plan.
previewFooter: This is what your athlete gets, plates and all. Want it for your team?
compRestructureBody: the volume taper moves earlier (one competition) or repeats (several) to peak on each date.
listEmpty: You haven’t created any competitions yet
listEmptySub1: Create a competition and attach several athletes at once.
listEmptySub2: For each one you can mark whether it’s their peak or a tune-up.
formNeedNameDate: Add a name and a date.
roleSubPicoUnanchored: peak · anchors when a macro is assigned
detailDeleteConfirm: Delete this competition? All athletes get detached (their data isn’t deleted).
detailEmptyEntries: You haven’t attached anyone yet. Tap “Attach athletes”.
acoplarSub: Pick from your roster and set each one’s role.
acoplarNoRoster: You don’t have athletes in your roster yet — invite them from Invitations to attach them.
acoplarAllAttached: Your whole roster is already attached to this competition.
needsRmHint: no 1RM · the peak anchors when a macro is assigned
